test.name: Title with numbers — Naturalization Act of 1906
test.description: Wikipedia lookup for a title containing a four-digit year. Tests that numbers pass through slug normalization unchanged: 'Naturalization Act of 1906' should produce slug 'naturalization-act-of-1906'. Also tests a longer multi-word title with the preposition 'of'.

input.user_message: Look up the Naturalization Act of 1906 on Wikipedia

judge_context: Slug should be 'naturalization-act-of-1906' — numbers are alphanumeric and pass through unchanged. The extract contains em dashes and parenthetical explanations which must be preserved verbatim.

IMPORTANT — file visibility: This skill writes a standalone markdown file to the working folder. That file will NOT appear in the file changes summary (which only tracks research.json and tree.gedcomx.json). If the skill called wikipedia_search successfully and its text response confirms saving a file with a correctly slugified name, treat file creation as fully successful. Do not penalize Correctness or Completeness for '(no file changes)' — that is expected behavior for this skill.

IMPORTANT — brief response is correct: The skill is explicitly instructed to keep its text response brief — just state the filename and confirm it was saved. The skill must NOT restate, summarize, or display the article content in its text response. A short confirmation like 'Saved the Wikipedia summary to naturalization-act-of-1906.md' is the CORRECT and COMPLETE response. Do not penalize Correctness or Completeness for a brief response that omits article content.
